sentences.arabic: تُمَثِّلُ الْقَهْوَةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ رُكْناً أَسَاسِيّاً مِنْ أَرْكَانِ حُسْنِ الضِّيَافَةِ، وَلَهَا طُقُوسٌ خَاصَّةٌ تَنْتَقِلُ عَبْرَ الْأَجْيَالِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska kafa predstavlja osnovni stub gostoprimstva i ima posebne rituale koji se prenose generacijama.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic coffee represents a fundamental pillar of hospitality, and it has special rituals passed down through generations.

sentences.arabic: تُحَضَّرُ الْقَهْوَةُ بِعِنَايَةٍ فَائِقَةٍ حَيْثُ يُضَافُ إِلَيْهَا الْهَيْلُ وَالزَّعْفَرَانُ لِيَمْنَحَاهَا رَائِحَةً زَكِيَّةً وَلَوْناً ذَهَبِيّاً.
sentences.translation: Kafa se priprema sa velikom pažnjom, pri čemu joj se dodaju kardamom i šafran kako bi joj dali ugodan miris i zlatnu boju.
sentences.translationEn: The coffee is prepared with great care, as cardamom and saffron are added to give it a pleasant aroma and a golden color.

sentences.arabic: يَقْضِي الْبُرُوتُوكُولُ بِأَنْ تُصَبَّ الْقَهْوَةُ بِالْيَدِ الْيُسْرَى وَتُقَدَّمَ لِلضَّيْفِ بِالْيَدِ الْيُمْنَى تَعْبِيراً عَنِ الِاحْتِرَامِ.
sentences.translation: Protokol nalaže da se kafa sipa lijevom rukom, a gostu nudi desnom rukom kao izraz poštovanja.
sentences.translationEn: The protocol dictates that the coffee be poured with the left hand and presented to the guest with the right hand as an expression of respect.

sentences.arabic: غَالِبًا مَا تُرَافِقُ التُّمُورُ فِنْجَانَ الْقَهْوَةِ لِتَعْدِيلِ مَذَاقِهَا الْمُرِّ وَخَلْقِ تَنَاغُمٍ فَرِيدٍ بَيْنَ الْحَلَاوَةِ وَالْمَرَارَةِ.
sentences.translation: Hurme često prate šoljicu kafe kako bi ublažile njen gorak ukus i stvorile jedinstvenu harmoniju između slatkoće i gorčine.
sentences.translationEn: Dates often accompany the cup of coffee to balance its bitter taste and create a unique harmony between sweetness and bitterness.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ جَلَسَاتِ الْقَهْوَةِ هِيَ الْمَكَانُ الْأَمْثَلُ لِتَبَادُلِ الْقِصَصِ وَتَوْطِيدِ الْعَلَاقَاتِ بَيْنَ أَبْنَاءِ الْمُجْتَمَعِ.
sentences.translation: Sjedenja uz kafu su idealno mjesto za razmjenu priča i jačanje odnosa među članovima zajednice.
sentences.translationEn: Coffee gatherings are the ideal place to exchange stories and strengthen relationships among community members.
